title: gh-146056: Fix TreeBuilder stack in xml.etree
author: vstinner
body:
No longer create a stack of 20 items, but create an empty stack instead. It prevents crashes when the stack list is discovered by gc.get_referrers() or other functions.

Fix also reference counting in treebuilder_handle_end().

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: I added "skip news" since this issue requires calling `gc.get_referrers()` which is used in "regular code".

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: I abandon my change since a more generic change was merged: https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/146129.
